articles.title: RBI tightens digital lending norms: NBFCs must comply by Q1 2026
articles.summary: The Reserve Bank of India has issued a circular mandating stricter compliance for all digital lending operations by NBFCs, requiring real-time loan disbursement audit trails and borrower KYC validation within 24 hours of application.

articles.title: NBFC digital lending compliance deadline approaching, industry scrambles
articles.summary: Mid-size non-banking financial companies are racing to overhaul their digital lending stacks ahead of the RBI's Q1 2026 compliance deadline, with many turning to RegTech vendors for automated audit trail solutions.

articles.title: Digital lending platforms face ₹50L fine risk under new RBI rules
articles.summary: Fintech lenders and NBFCs risk penalties of up to ₹50 lakh per violation under the updated digital lending framework, prompting urgent system upgrades and third-party audits.

articles.title: RBI circular on digital lending: What it means for NBFCs and fintechs
articles.summary: Legal experts break down the Reserve Bank of India's latest circular on digital lending, highlighting the key compliance obligations for both licensed NBFCs and their technology partners.

articles.title: UPI payment aggregator licensing: RBI mandates fresh registrations by March 2026
articles.summary: The RBI has issued new guidelines requiring all payment aggregators processing UPI transactions above ₹500 crore monthly to obtain a fresh PA license by March 31, 2026, causing disruption for several mid-size fintechs.

articles.title: Payment aggregators scramble for RBI PA license as deadline looms
articles.summary: Several prominent payment aggregators are in advanced discussions with compliance consultants and legal teams as the RBI's payment aggregator licensing deadline approaches, with industry bodies seeking a 90-day extension.

articles.title: SEBI releases framework for crypto asset regulation in India
articles.summary: SEBI has released a comprehensive framework for the regulation of virtual digital assets, requiring exchanges and custodians to register with SEBI by June 2026 and maintain segregated client funds in regulated bank accounts.

articles.title: India crypto exchanges brace for SEBI oversight: compliance costs to surge
articles.summary: Domestic crypto exchanges including CoinDCX and WazirX are preparing for a significant compliance overhaul following SEBI's virtual digital asset regulation framework, with estimated first-year compliance costs ranging from ₹5-20 crore.

articles.title: Account Aggregator framework sees 10x adoption surge in FY2026
articles.summary: India's Account Aggregator ecosystem crossed 50 million active consents in FY2026, with major banks and NBFCs integrating AA-based credit decisioning to reduce loan underwriting time from weeks to hours.

articles.title: NBFCs leverage Account Aggregator data for real-time credit scoring
articles.summary: Forward-looking NBFCs are integrating with the Account Aggregator network to access consented financial data in real time, enabling credit decisions within minutes and dramatically reducing delinquency rates.

articles.title: RBI stress test finds 18 NBFCs undercapitalized, mandates remediation plans
articles.summary: The Reserve Bank of India's bi-annual financial stability report identified 18 non-banking financial companies with capital adequacy ratios below the 15% regulatory minimum, requiring them to submit remediation plans within 60 days.

articles.title: NBFC sector stress: RBI flags concentration risk in unsecured lending
articles.summary: RBI's latest financial stability report warns of growing concentration risk in the NBFC sector's unsecured lending book, with the top 10 digital lenders accounting for 68% of unsecured retail disbursements.

articles.title: KYC simplification: UIDAI, RBI jointly launch e-KYC 2.0 for financial services
articles.summary: UIDAI and the Reserve Bank of India have jointly launched e-KYC 2.0, a unified digital identity verification framework that enables financial institutions to complete KYC in under 3 minutes using Aadhaar biometrics and PAN linkage.

articles.title: Fintechs racing to integrate e-KYC 2.0 as customer onboarding time drops 80%
articles.summary: Several fintech companies have reported dramatic improvements in customer onboarding metrics after integrating with UIDAI's e-KYC 2.0 framework, with average onboarding time dropping from 15 minutes to under 3 minutes.

articles.title: India fintech sector raises $2.1B in Q4 FY2026 despite global slowdown
articles.summary: Indian fintech companies collectively raised $2.1 billion in Q4 FY2026, with insurance tech, embedded finance, and B2B payments attracting the lion's share of capital, even as global fintech funding contracted 22% year-on-year.
